description_long: This object is a vintage desktop computer setup featuring a CRT monitor, a separate keyboard, and a base unit with a floppy disk drive. The monitor has a thick, square bezel with a matte gray finish and a small sticky note attached to the top right corner. The rear of the monitor displays a large sticker and a sloped, angular casing typical of older CRT designs. The base unit includes a floppy disk drive, ventilation grilles, and additional stickers, while the keyboard is full-sized with a numeric keypad and a coiled cable connecting it to the system. The entire setup is adorned with several decorative stickers, giving it a personalized, slightly worn appearance. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal components inside, and the object is sized to sit on a desk or table in an urban environment.
description: A vintage CRT computer monitor with a thick gray bezel, attached to a base unit and full-sized keyboard, decorated with stickers and a sticky note.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square CRT screen, thick bezel, floppy disk drive, and full keyboard with a sticky note on the monitor.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the monitor's deep, angular casing, coiled cable, and side ventilation grilles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sloped back of the monitor, a large sticker, and the back of the base unit with additional stickers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing more stickers on the monitor and base, the coiled cable, and the keyboard's side profile.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, square, and made of matte gray plastic with sharp corners and no decorative elements, providing a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by a rectangular, integrated base unit that is boxy and solid, made of matching gray plastic, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on the lower right of the base unit, arranged in a horizontal row beneath the screen.
attribute_brand_logo: A subtle brand logo is present at the center of the bottom bezel, embossed in the same gray color as the bezel.
